doc_title: OSHA Technical Manual - Section IV, Chapter 6, Combustible Dusts

steps.text: Read and become familiar with the Combustible Dust National Emphasis Program (NEP) before referring to this chapter.
Complete specific combustible dust training before conducting inspections.
Inspect and investigate workplaces where combustible dust is present.
Recognize combustible dust characteristics and hazards before beginning an inspection.
Determine how to safely conduct the inspection before proceeding.
Collect representative samples of different types of combustible dusts at the facility.
Determine the tests to request from the SLTC Laboratory.
Safely package and ship samples to the SLTC.
Document inspection observations and findings thoroughly.
Seek help and answers from supervisors or experienced personnel as needed.

preconditions.text: Before performing a combustible dust inspection, ensure that appropriate safety and training requirements have been met.
